image_label: test2 - Spanish tiny house 4.5m x 6m, single-story plan (3D rendered top view)

scale_origin.note: local origin = SW outer corner. x east, y north. Units METERS (comma decimal, e.g. 3,00 = 3.00 m). Outer footprint 4.50 (x) x 6.00 (y) m. Photoreal 3D top view -> walls read as dark extruded blocks; centerlines traced.

strokes.note: south perimeter wall. Carries living sliding door/window (S12).
west perimeter wall. Carries bedroom window (S10) + living window (S11).
horizontal partition: bedroom (north) / living (south). Healed door opening at x~=2.4 (bedroom->living swing arc). MEDIUM confidence on y (=top 3,00 band).
vertical partition: bedroom (west) / bath BANO (east). MEDIUM confidence on x (=top split 3,00).
bath south wall (BANO bottom, right 2,00 band from top -> y=4.00). Healed door opening at x~=3.4 (bath door arc).
bedroom west window (opening on left wall). World-z unknown. On parent wall S3.
living west window (opening on left wall). World-z unknown. On parent wall S3. MEDIUM confidence.
living south sliding glass door/window (large bottom opening). World-z unknown. On parent wall S1.

dimensions.note: exterior setback dim (building to property edge); not a wall

ocr_texts.note: green badge callout (overall width); duplicates dim chain
green badge callout (overall depth); duplicates dim chain

unknowns_noted: window sill/head world-z unknowable (plan-only, no elevation) -> z absent
interior partition coordinates (S5-S7) MEDIUM confidence from room bands; no interior dim chains
units meters; dimension text verbatim with comma decimal
uncaptured_visual_elements: FURNITURE excluded: double bed; black leather sofa; dining table + chairs; kitchen counter; nightstands
SANITARY excluded: bath toilet, shower, sink (BANO)
FLOOR-FINISH excluded: marble/wood floor texture; blue bath floor tiles
LANDSCAPE excluded: exterior tree (bottom-right), paving outside
DECORATION excluded: potted plant on dining table
CALLOUT logged: green badges '4.5m' and '6m' (decorative overall-size markers, duplicate the dim chains) -> kept in ocr_texts T5/T6
HEALED DOORS (2): bedroom->living (S5, x~=2.4); bath->passage (S7, x~=3.4)
WINDOWS S10-S12 captured at plan position; vertical z absent (no elevation)
